singleNativeRcDemo.kadreSource: external/poc-koreos source build; settings.gradle.kts substitutes org.graphiks.kadre coordinates when the submodule is provisioned
singleNativeRcDemo.reason: Uses the existing interactive Kadre task as the single RC native demo command rather than adding a second native-window task.

headlessEvidence.reason: Validates checked-in M90 runtime evidence without resolving Kadre native runtime dependencies.

optionalDirectRuntimeRefresh.submodulePrecondition: git submodule update --init --recursive external/poc-koreos or provide local org.graphiks.kadre artifacts
optionalDirectRuntimeRefresh.reason: Optional evidence regeneration path; not a checked-in RC/CI gate when Kadre source substitution is unavailable.

semantics: ArrowRight selects the next renderable bounded replay scene.
ArrowLeft returns to the previous renderable bounded replay scene.
Config selection of the nested rrect clip scene remains expected-unsupported with a stable fallback reason.

inputControls.reason: Headless evidence uses deterministic input fixtures and does not claim real window-manager event injection.

telemetryExport.boundedExportPolicy: checked-in JSON snapshots overwrite by artifact path; no append-only native log is wired into CI

telemetrySummary.readinessReason: This closeout improves PM evidence classification and demo procedure, but does not add a new counted release-gated rendering capability.

blockers.summary: Kadre/wgpu4k does not expose broad shader/pipeline/bind-group cache hit/miss callbacks to Kanvas evidence code.
blockers.unblockCondition: Expose explicit runtime cache counters or callbacks in the Kadre/wgpu4k route used by the native demo.

blockers.summary: Selected-scene resource growth is bounded by the M85 deterministic ledger, but native WebGPU object lifetime/free callbacks are not observable end-to-end.
blockers.unblockCondition: Add observable resource allocation/free snapshots or adapter-owned memory telemetry.

validationRows.assertion: At least three renderable scenes and one expected-unsupported scene are documented from M90.
Pointer and keyboard state changes are present in M90 evidence without claiming real OS injection.
Native demo is opt-in; headless evidence and validator do not open a window.
Telemetry export path and bounded snapshot policy are documented.
Observed, derived, expected-unsupported, and not-observable rows are separated.
One opt-in native RC command is documented with external/poc-koreos precondition and no CI dependency.
Readiness does not increase because no new release-blocking runtime gate is claimed.
PM dashboard, Kadre native command, and native-unavailable fallback are scripted.

nonClaims: No new native window execution was performed for this closeout artifact.
No native-window task is wired into CI or pipelinePmBundle.
No broad SkCanvas/display-list replay claim is added.
No release-grade frame.kadre-windowed FPS gate is claimed.
No broad observed WebGPU cache hit/miss telemetry is claimed.
WGSL remains the shader implementation target; SkSL is only compatibility/refusal wording.
